_note: Canned deterministic A/B DIVERGENCE tape — STALE FV NO_QUOTE. Three warmup ticks (fresh FV, gap 0.05) warm BOTH arms' venue references AND the guarded basis. The fourth tick arrives far in the future (as_of 50000) with NO fresh FV: the guard projects the last-seen FV (recv 29700), now transport-stale (50000 - 29700 = 20300 > fv_freshness_ms 10000), so arm B fails closed to NO_QUOTE/txline_stale BEFORE it ever reaches the residual band. Arm A is FV-blind and quotes BOTH sides (QUOTE_TWO_SIDED) on the same tick. Warmup prefix byte-identical across arms; streams diverge at tick 4 ONLY. Requires overrides ref_min_samples=2, basis_min_samples=2.
